zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Roche於大約1342年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾時，他的父親Sir Robert de la Roche28歲，母親Lady Elizabeth de la Roche22歲。他於1367年與Isabel Bromwich在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾蕾托 布洛維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1376年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Roche于大约1342年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert de la Roche28岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth de la Roche22岁。他于1367年与Isabel Bromwich在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾蕾托 布洛維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1376年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Roche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

variants.name: Laroche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Normand, Pierre, Jacques, Laurent, Adrien, Cecile, Germain, Marcel.
French:
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Laroche or La Roche, from Old French roche ‘rock’, with feminine definite article la.

variants.name: Larocque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Marcel, Normand, Valmore, Yves, Achille, Amie, Donat, Emile.

French: habitational name from La Ro(c)que, the name of several places in various parts of France, from a regional variant of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche , compare Laroche ), with feminine definite article la. Compare Laroque .

Altered form of southern French Roquebrune or of its variant Rocquebrune: habitational name from Ro(c)quebrune, the name of several places in the southern part of France. The surname Roquebrune is rare in France, while the variant Rocquebrune is extinct there. Compare Larock , Lerocque , Rockburn , and Rocque 1.

variants.name: Rochet
meanings: French: diminutive of   Roche  , a topographic name meaning ‘rock’, or a habitational name from (Le) Rochet, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Catalan: of French origin (see above). This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic and Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Rochat
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Philippe, Pierre.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of Old French roche ‘rock’ (see Roche 2), or a habitational name from Le Rochat, the name of several places in the eastern part of France.

variants.name: Roach
meanings: English:

of Norman origin, from Old French and Middle English roche ‘rock, cliff, promontory’, sometimes a translation of Stone . The surname may have been topographic, denoting someone who lived on or by a prominent rock or rocky place, or a habitational name for someone who lived or came from a place so named, such as one of those called Roque or Roche(s) in Normandy and neighboring regions, or Roche in Cornwall, Roach Farm in Clyst Hydon (Devon), or Roch in Pembrokeshire (see Roch ).

in Lancashire perhaps referring to the River Roch, which runs through Rochdale; the river name is probably a back-formation from Recedham, an early name for Rochdale recorded in 1086, derived from Old English reced ‘building, house, hall’ + hām ‘village, homestead’. Alternatively, the Lancashire name could be a shortened form of the now rare or extinct surname Rochdale alias Rachedale, Rachdall, a habitational name from Rochdale (Lancashire). From the 18th century onward the name is difficult to distinguish from Roch , borne by Irish migrants to South Lancashire, especially Liverpool.

variants.name: Roquet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Camille.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche and Roque ), or a habitational name from (Le) Roquet, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Rochez
meanings: Walloon and French: variant of   Roche   2 or   Rocher  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Roche was born about 1342, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de la Roche, was 28 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth de la Roche, was 22. He married Isabel Bromwich in 1367, in Little Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1376, in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Roche est né environ 1342, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de la Roche, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth de la Roche, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bromwich en 1367, à Little Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1376, à Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de la Rocheが約1342年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de la Rocheは28歳，母Lady Elizabeth de la Rocheは22歳であった。1367年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリットル ブロムウィチでIsabel Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1376年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル ブロムウィチで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Roche(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de la Roche(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth de la Roche(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 리틀 브롬위치에서 Isabel Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 브롬위치에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Roche родился около 1342 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de la Roche было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth de la Roche, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bromwich в 1367 г. в местности литл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1376 г. в местности кастл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
